MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-04-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING DISMISSAL AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANTS EDWARD J. KIM AND QUEENS SF LLC PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 664.6 =, WHICH IS UNOPPOSED, IS GRANTED. THE DISMISSAL ENTERED SEPTEMBER 2, 2021, IS VACATED AND JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $19,828.82, PLUS COSTS OF SUIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $74.52. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendants
Off Calendar Aug-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendants

Plaintiff American Express National Bank's Motion for Order Vacating Dismissal and Entry of Judgment Against Defendants Edward J. Kim and Queens SF LLC Pursuant to CCP Section 664.6 =, which is unopposed, if GRANTED. The dismissal entered September 2, 2021, is vacated and judgment shall be entered in favor of Plaintiff in the amount of $19,828.82, plus costs of suit in the amount of $74.52.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2021 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-09-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
